settings.title: Ukax mä juk’a pachanakanwa
settings.light_mode: Modo de luz ukax mä juk’a pachanakanwa
settings.show_sample_saved_feeds: Uñacht’ayaña muestras de alimentos salvados ukanakata
settings.update_email_desc: Ukhamaraki, machaq correo electrónico ukar mantañamawa.
settings.change_password_desc: Jumatix contraseña mayjt’ayañ munsta ukhax mä código de verificación ukaruw correo electrónico ukar apayanipxäma.
settings.own_domain_desc: Jumatix dominio propio ukanïsta ukhax ukax manija ukhamaw apnaqasispa. Ukax khitïtas uk chiqañchañatakiw yanaptʼi.
settings.birthdate_private: Aka yatiyawixa sapa mayniru uñt’ayatawa ukatxa janiwa yaqha apnaqirinakampixa uñt’ayatakiti.
settings.export_data_desc: Archivo de cuentas ukax taqi datos públicos ukanakaw utji ukat posts, medios de comunicación ukat perfil ukanakan yatiyawinakap uñt’ayi. Archivo ukax formato CAR ukankiwa ukatx janiw datos privados ukanakax silenciados usuarios jan ukax DMs ukanakar uñt’ayatakiti.
settings.car_note: Aka lurawix yant’awiwa. Jiwasan blog tuqinx datos exportación tuqitx juk’amp uñakipt’apxasmawa.
settings.deactivate_account: Cuenta desactivar ukax mä juk’a pachanakanwa
settings.deactivate_account_desc: Perfil, posts, feeds ukat listas ukanakax janiw yaqha Bluesky ukankirinakatakix uñjatäxaniti. Ukaxa kuna pachatixa mayampi activatäspawa, ukaxa mantasawa.
settings.deactivate_info: Cuenta desactivación ukax janiw datos ukanak chhaqtaykiti. Jumatix cuentam wiñayatak chhaqtayañ munsta ukhaxa, Cuenta chhaqtayañ opción apnaqañamawa.
settings.delete_account_desc: Seguridad ukatakix mä código confirmación ukaruw correo electrónico ukar apayañasa.
settings.delete_account_info: Ukhamaraki mä juk’a pachatakixa cuenta ukarux desactivar, ukatxa kuna pachatixa mayampi activatarakiwa.

language.title: Aru
language.app_language_desc: Select a language to use for the app's user interface.
language.primary_language_desc: Jaqukipäwinakatakix feed ukan munat arut ajlliñamawa.
language.content_languages_desc: Select which languages you want your subscribed feeds to include. If none are selected, all languages are shown.
language.zh-CN: 简体中文 – Chino aru ch’amanchata
language.zh-TW: 繁體中文 – Chino nayra pacha
language.pt-BR: português do Brasil – Brasil markan portugués aru
language.pt-PT: português europeu – Europa markan portugués aru
language.th: ภาษาไทย – Tailandés aru
language.km: ภาษาเขมร – Khmer ukat juk’ampinaka
language.modal_desc: Janitï maynis ajllitäkchi ukhaxa, taqi arunakaw manq’añanakaman uñacht’ayatäni.

profile.user_not_found_desc: The user you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
profile.blocked_by_desc: You cannot follow or see this user's posts.
profile.is_blocking_desc: You cannot see their posts or interact with them.

common.delete_post_confirm_message: This cannot be undone. The post will be removed from your profile, the timeline of any accounts that follow you, and from search results.

signalr.disconnected: SignalR Disconnected. Real-time updates may be delayed.

common.start_typing: Search for posts, users, or feeds

feeds.title: Manq’añanaka
feeds.my_feeds_desc: All your saved feeds in one place.
feeds.discover_new_desc: Choose your own feeds! Community-built feeds help you find the content you love.
feeds.no_posts_desc: This feed doesn't have any posts right now.
feeds.discover_empty: Jichhakamax janiw kuna machaq jikxatañas utjkiti.
feeds.following_empty_recent: Janiw jichha posts ukanakax jaqinakan arktatanakapatx utjkiti.
feeds.follow_more_cta: Juk’amp cuentanak arktañamawa juk’amp contenidonak uñjañataki.
feeds.discover_new_feeds_desc: ¡Juma pachpaw manq’añanak ajlliñama! Ayllun lurat manq’añanakax kuna contenidonaktix munkta uk jikxatañ yanapt’i.
feeds.no_pinned: Janiw kuna pinned feeds ukanakas utjkiti.
feeds.following_end: Juk’amp jaqinakar arktañamawa juk’amp contenidonak jikxatañataki...
feeds.feeds_guide: Feeds ukax algoritmos personalizados ukawa, ukax apnaqirinakax mä juk’a codificación yatiñampiw lurapxi. Aka guia uñakipt’aña juk’ampi yatxatañataki.
feeds.discover_description: ¡Juma pachpaw manq’añanak ajlliñama! Ayllun lurat manq’añanakax kuna contenidonaktix munkta uk jikxatañ yanapt’i.
feeds.my_feeds_hint: Pin manq’añanaka Utaru yapxatañataki. Uta tuqin ordenañatakix configuración apnaqañaw wakisi.

lists.title: Lists
lists.create_desc: Lists allow you to see content from your favorite people.
lists.confirm_leave: Are you sure you want to leave this list?
lists.confirm_remove_member: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
lists.no_joined_lists: You haven't joined any lists yet.
lists.confirm_remove_post: Remove this post from the list?
lists.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this list?
lists.feed_end: No more posts in this list...
lists.feed_empty: No posts in this list yet.

moderation.title: Moderación ukax mä juk’a pachanakanwa
moderation.blocked_accounts_info: Cuentas bloqueadas ukanakax janiw posts ukanakarux jaysapkaspati, jumat arskaspati, jan ukax jumamp chikt’atäkaspati. Janiw jupanakan contenidop uñjañjamäkaniti ukat jupanakax janiw jumanakan utjki ukanak uñjapxañapäkiti.
moderation.no_blocked_accounts: Janiw kuna cuentanakas jark’atäkiti. Mä cuenta jark’aqañatakix perfil ukar sarañamawa ukat cuentapan menú ukanx "Bloquear cuenta" uk ajlliñamawa.
moderation.verification_info: Bluesky ukan chiqanchawix mä dominio ukan dueñop uñacht’ayasaw irnaqäna. Ukhamaraki, DNS registro ukar uñt’ayasa jan ukax sitio web ukar mä archivo ukar apkatasax identidad ukar chiqanchañamawa.
moderation.verification_method_dns: DNS TXT Grabación ukax mä juk’a pachanakanwa
moderation.verification_dns_instruction: Mä TXT qillqawi dominio DNS configuración ukar yapxataña aka sutimpi ukhamaraki valorampi:
moderation.verification_http_instruction: Mä archivo sitio web ukar aka thakhin apkatañamawa DID ukax contenido ukhama:
moderation.verification_failed: Chiqañchäwix janiw phuqhaskiti. Ukhamaraki, wakicht’awinaka uñakipt’aña ukatxa mayampi yant’aña.
moderation.interaction_info: Aka wakichäwinakax machaq post lurañanx default ukhamaw apnaqasini. Ukanakax post-por-post ukax compositor ukan editarjamawa.
moderation.block_confirm: ¿Jumax {{name}} ukar jark’añ munasmati? Jupanakax janiw posts ukanakam uñjapkaniti, janirakiw jumamp chikt’atäpkaniti.
moderation.mute_confirm: ¿Jumax {{name}} ukar amukt’ayañ munasmati? Jupanakan qillqatanakapax janiw feeds ukanakan uñstxaniti.
moderation.add_muted_word_title: Muted aru jan ukax etiqueta yapxataña
moderation.muted_word_desc: Posts ukanakax qillqatanakaparjama, etiquetanakaparu jan ukax panpachaniruw amukt’ayasispa. Walja posts ukan uñstki uka común arunakat jithiqtañatakiw iwxt’apxsma, kunatix inas jan posts uñacht’ayatäkaspati.
moderation.input_placeholder: Aru jan ukax etiqueta ukar qillqt’aña
moderation.mute_in: Mute in ukax mä juk’a pachanakanwa
moderation.no_muted_words: Janiw kuna arunakas ni etiquetas ukanakas amukt’ayatäkiti
moderation.hide_completely_desc: Posts ukax taqpach imantataw feeds ukanakat.
moderation.show_warning_desc: Posts ukanakax mä advertencia ukamp uñacht’ayatäniwa.
moderation.mod_lists_empty: Listas públicas, compartibles de usuarios ukax walja muting jan ukax bloqueo ukatakiw.
moderation.list_desc_placeholder: e.g. Usuarionakax walja kutiw anuncios ukanakamp jaysapxi.
moderation.muted_accounts_info: Cuentas silenciadas ukanakat qillqatanakax feeds ukat yatiyawinakat apsutäniwa. Muting ukax privado ukhamawa.
moderation.no_muted_accounts: Jumax janiw kuna cuentanaks mute lurktati. Mä cuenta amukt’ayañatakixa, perfil ukar sarañamawa ukatxa menú ukanxa "Cuenta mute" ukxa ajlliñamawa.
moderation.graphic_media: Medios Gráficos ukax mä juk’a pachanakanwa
moderation.graphic_media_desc: Medios gráficos jan ukax potencialmente contenido gráfico.
moderation.non_sexual_nudity: Jan sexual Desnudez ukax mä juk’a pachanakanwa
moderation.report_notice: Yatiyäwinakax mä jan kuna jan walt’äwin comunidad utjañapatakiw yanapt’istu. Jiwasan moderadoranakax aka contenido uñakipapxani.
moderation.reason_sexual: Contenido Sexual ukax mä juk’a pachanakanwa
moderation.content_hidden_desc: Aka contenido ukax imantatawa configuración ukanakampi
moderation.content_warn_desc: Aka contenido ukax inas sensitivo ukhamächispa
moderation.sensitive_content: Contenido Sensitivo ukax mä juk’a pachanakanwa
moderation.bsky_moderation_service: Servicio de Moderación Bluesky ukax mä jach’a uñacht’äwiwa
moderation.bsky_moderation_service_desc: Servicio oficial de moderación Bluesky ukax mä jach’a uñacht’äwiwa.

privacy.title: Privacidad ukatxa Seguridad uka tuqita
privacy.2fa_modal_desc: Mä código correo electrónico tuqi apayatañapawa mantañataki.
privacy.app_passwords_info: App contraseñas apnaqañamawa yaqha Bluesky apps ukar mantañataki jan taqpach cuenta contraseña churasa.
privacy.add_app_password: App ukax mä contraseña ukamp yapxatatawa
privacy.app_password_modal_desc: Ukax yaqha Bluesky apps ukar mantañatakix apnaqirin sutimamp chikaw apnaqasi.
privacy.app_password_modal_warning: Jichhaxa aka contraseña copiaña. Janiw mayampsa uñjjjätati. Chhaqt’asïta ukhaxa, machaq uñstayañamawa.
privacy.app_password_input_title: App ukax mä contraseña ukamp yapxatatawa
privacy.app_password_input_desc: Aka app contraseña ukatakix mä suti qillqt’añamawa jan ukax aleatoriamente lurat apnaqañamawa.
privacy.notify_posts_desc: Aka lurawix apnaqirinakaruw yatiyawinak katuqañapatak yanapt’i, kunapachatix mä post lurapki ukhaxa. Aka lurawix jist’antatawa yaqha apnaqirinakar jan yatiyawinak katuqañataki kunapachatix mä post lurapk ukhaxa.
privacy.logout_visibility_label: Apps ukanakax cuenta uñacht’ayañat aynacht’ayañamawa, ukax mistki uka apnaqirinakaruw uñacht’ayi
privacy.logout_visibility_desc: Bluesky ukax janiw perfil ukat post ukanak uñacht’aykaniti, ukax mistuwayxiwa. Yaqha apps ukanakax inas uka mayiwirux jan jach’añchapkchiti. Ukhamatwa cuentamxa privado ukham tukuyi.
privacy.logout_visibility_note: Qhanacht’awi: Bluesky ukax mä red abierto ukat pública ukawa. Aka wakicht’awix Bluesky app ukat sitio web ukan uñt’ayañakiw limita, ukat yaqha apps ukanakax janiw uka wakichäw respetkaspati. Contenido ukax wali uñacht’ayatarakispawa yaqha apps ukat sitios web ukanakampi.
privacy.learn_more: Bluesky ukan kunatix taqinitak uñt’atäki ukanak juk’amp yatxatapxañäni.
privacy.learn_more_public: Bluesky ukan kunatix taqinitak uñt’atäki ukanak juk’amp yatxatapxañäni.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.likes_desc: Get notifications when people like your posts.
notifications.followers_desc: Get notifications when people follow you.
notifications.reply_desc: Get notifications when people reply to your posts.
notifications.mention_desc: Get notifications when people mention you in their posts.
notifications.quote_desc: Get notifications when people quote your posts.
notifications.repost_desc: Get notifications when people repost your posts.
notifications.activity_desc: Get notifications about activity from other users.
notifications.likes_reposts_desc: Get notifications when people like your reposts.
notifications.reposts_reposts_desc: Get notifications when people repost your reposts.
notifications.others_desc: Get notifications for other types of activity.
notifications.enabled_desc: Allow receiving notifications for this type
notifications.push_desc: Get push notifications on your device

explore.no_posts_found: No trending posts found in the last 24 hours.

messages.title: Yatiyawinaka
messages.leave_confirm: ¿Chiqapunit aka aruskipäwit mistxañ munta? Aka lurawixa janiwa mayjt’ayatäkaspati.
messages.confirm_delete_for_me: ¿Jumatakix aka yatiyaw chhaqtayañ munasmati? Yaqha chikancht’asirinakatakix uñjkañaw qhiparani.

chat_settings.title: Chat ukan utt’ayatanakapa
chat_settings.allow_messages_from_desc: Khitis jumamp chika mä directo mensaje aruskipäw qalltaspa uk ajlliñamawa.
chat_settings.allow_ongoing_desc: Kawkïr wakichäwsa ajllisksta ukhasa, sapa kuti parltʼasiskakismawa.

search.title: Thaqhata
search.placeholder: Posts jan ukax usuarios ukanakar thaqhaña...
search.no_results_desc: Yaqha thaqhañ yant’am, jan ukax pantjasiwinak qillqt’añ uñakipt’añamawa.
search.start_desc: Bluesky ukan posts ukat jaqinakar jikxatañamawa.

post.title: Post
post.replies_disabled: Replies are disabled for this post
post.alt_text_help: Alternative text describes images for people who are blind or have low vision, and helps add context for everyone.
post.discard_message: Are you sure you want to discard this draft?
post.muted_by_word: Post hidden by your muted word
post.giphy_key_missing: GIPHY API Key is missing. Please set REACT_APP_GIPHY_API_KEY in your .env file.
post.giphy_key_invalid: Invalid GIPHY API Key. Please check your REACT_APP_GIPHY_API_KEY.
post.not_found_desc: This post doesn't exist or is unavailable.
post.not_found_sub: It might have been deleted or the link is incorrect.

interests.page_desc: The interests you select help us find what you like!

content.enable_video_discover: Enable featured videos in Discover feed
content.tree_view_desc: Mä threaded quqa uñjäwin post jaysäwinak uñacht’ayaña
content.show_sample_saved_feeds: Uñacht’ayaña muestras de alimentos salvados ukanakatxa Aka manq’añana
content.external_media_title: Anqax medios de comunicación ukarjam uñt’ayaña
content.external_media_info: Anqa medios de comunicación ukanakax sitios web ukanakarux jumat ukhamarak dispositivo ukan yatiyawinakap apthapiñapatakiw jaysapxaspa. Janiw kuna yatiyawis apayatakiti jan ukax mayitäkiti "play" ukx ch'iqt'añkama.
content.enable_embed_for: Medios de comunicación ukan anatirinakapar ch’amanchaña
content.my_interests_desc: Uka temas ukanakax ajllitäki ukanakax contenido ukar puriñ yanapt’apxitu, ukax jumatakix wali askiwa.

best_practices_list: Use titles that grab attention but aren't clickbait.
Target specific roles when the message isn't relevant to everyone.
Avoid sending too many broadcasts to prevent user fatigue.
